findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `SemigroupGroup.lean:256 theorem conj_symm ... conj (F (p.1 + q.1, p.2 - q.2)) = F (q.1 + p.1, q.2 - p.2)`.
findings.fix: Delete this declaration and use `hF.conj_symm (t, 0) (u, 0)` with `simpa`.
findings.issue: `timeAxis_conj_symm` is directly replaced by existing `IsSemigroupGroupPD.conj_symm` specialized to `(t, 0)` and `(u, 0)`.

findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `SemigroupGroup.lean:245 theorem quadForm_two_nonneg ... F (p.1 + q.1, p.2 - q.2) ...`.
findings.fix: Delete this declaration and use `hF.quadForm_two_nonneg (t, 0) (u, 0) c₀ c₁` with simplification of `0 - 0`.
findings.issue: `timeAxis_quadForm_two_nonneg` duplicates the existing two-point BCR quadratic-form lemma at points `(t,0)` and `(u,0)`.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits: `SemigroupGroup.lean:262 theorem diagonal_nonneg ... 0 ≤ F (t + t, 0)`, `:268 theorem diagonal_im`, `:273 theorem diagonal_re_nonneg`, `:279 theorem diagonal_eq_ofReal_re`.
findings.fix: Delete these declarations and use `hF.diagonal_nonneg`, `hF.diagonal_im`, `hF.diagonal_re_nonneg`, and `hF.diagonal_eq_ofReal_re`.
findings.issue: `timeAxis_diagonal_nonneg`, `timeAxis_diagonal_im`, `timeAxis_diagonal_re_nonneg`, and `timeAxis_diagonal_eq_ofReal_re` repeat existing diagonal lemmas with identical conclusions.

summary: Several new time-axis declarations are direct specializations of existing `IsSemigroupGroupPD` API and should not be added as parallel names.
